---
name: New block proposal
about: Propose a new typed block for the catalog
title: 'Block: '
labels: enhancement, block
assignees: ''
---

**Block type & purpose**
Proposed `type` (kebab-case) and the one-line description the AI would see.

**Typed schema (sketch)**
The config fields and their kinds — remember: **no raw-HTML field**.

**Static or powered?**
If powered, which runtime `capabilities` does it declare?

**Definition-of-done check**
- [ ] Typed schema, shared design tokens, total render (defaults + escaping).
- [ ] Additive & non-breaking.
- [ ] Consumer-neutral.
